ai_summary: **Executive Summary: AGRO PHOS (INDIA) LIMITED - SEBI Regulation 74(5) Compliance**  Agro Phos (India) Limited, through its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent Bigshare Services Pvt. Ltd., confirms compliance with SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. This indicates the timely and proper processing of dematerialization requests, including cancellation of physical securities and updating of shareholder records within 15 days, ensuring operational integrity. The document presents standard compliance information and contains no material impacts or red flags.
